hero.title: One shared place for your child — across homes
hero.description: Lina brings together everything your child needs: conversations, memories, schedules, and practical information — all in one calm, organized space.

csSection.label: Care Schedule
csSection.title: Plan your custody schedule together
csSection.description: Lina's interactive care schedule lets both parents plan and visualize how time is shared across weeks. See day splits, weekend patterns, and handover frequency — all in one clear view.

how.label: How it works
how.title: Set up in minutes, use every day

step1.title: Create a shared space
step1.description: One parent sets up a space for the child. The other gets an invite to join. No complicated setup required.

step2.title: Add what matters
step2.description: Add contacts, medical information, equipment lists, and anything else that needs to follow the child between homes.

step3.title: Stay in sync
step3.description: Use threads for practical conversations and the shared album for photos. Both parents see the same information, always up to date.

threads.title: Threads
threads.description: Organized topic conversations instead of a single chat. Keep logistics, school matters, and health updates separate and easy to find.

album.title: Shared album
album.description: A private photo album that both parents can add to and view. So neither parent misses the moments that happen in the other home.

childInfo.title: Child information
childInfo.description: Store medical details, allergies, and other important facts about your child in one place that both parents can access and update.

equipment.title: Equipment list
equipment.description: Track what gear the child has and where it is — sports equipment, school supplies, seasonal items — so nothing gets lost between handovers.

contacts.title: Shared contacts
contacts.description: Keep doctors, teachers, and other important contacts in a shared directory. Both parents always have the right number when they need it.

households.title: Built for two households
households.description: Lina is designed specifically for co-parenting. Simple, focused, and free from the noise of a general family app.
